# SmartTask — Intelligent Operations Management Platform

> SmartTask is a full-stack task and operations management system built for SH Design & Print Sdn. Bhd., a Malaysian printing and design company. It streamlines order tracking, staff workforce management, leave administration, and AI-powered task scheduling through a unified web portal.

## What This Site Does

SmartTask replaces manual spreadsheets and phone-based coordination with a centralized digital dashboard. Managers create customer orders (banners, buntings, planners, business cards, flyers, etc.), and the system automatically distributes production tasks to available staff using a Round-Robin Load Balancing algorithm. Staff members access their own portal to view assignments, update task progress, apply for leave, and manage their profiles.

## Who It Helps

- **Managers / Administrators**: Full operational oversight — KPI dashboards, order management, staff directory, leave approval, and automated task scheduling.
- **Staff / Employees**: Self-service portal for viewing assigned tasks, submitting leave requests, tracking leave status, and updating personal profiles.
- **SH Design & Print Operations Team**: End-to-end production workflow from order intake to task assignment to delivery tracking.

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: React 18 + Vite (SPA with client-side routing)
- Backend: Node.js + Express.js REST API
- Database: MySQL (via XAMPP / phpMyAdmin)
- AI Integration: DeepSeek API (planned — smart task analysis)
- Authentication: bcrypt password hashing, role-based access control (RBAC)
- Styling: Custom CSS design system (DM Sans + Sora typography, glassmorphism UI)

## Important Pages

### Authentication

- /login — Unified login portal for both Managers and Staff. Role-based routing automatically redirects to the correct dashboard.
- /staf/login — Dedicated staff login page with simplified interface.

### Admin Portal (Manager / Administrator)

- /dashboard — Main KPI dashboard showing pending orders, completed tasks, active staff count, staff on leave, and recent audit logs.
- /tempahan — Order list showing all customer bookings with status tracking (Pending, In Progress, Completed).
- /tempahan/baru — New order creation form with fields for client name, item type, quantity, price, due date, delivery type, delivery location, and specifications.
- /jadual — AI-powered task scheduling engine. Uses Round-Robin load balancing to automatically distribute pending tasks across available staff. Includes a visual task board grouped by staff member.
- /staf — Staff directory listing all employees with their roles, status (Active/Inactive), and quick access to individual profiles.
- /staf/:id — Individual staff profile showing personal information, contact details, employee status, and current task assignments.
- /cuti — Leave management dashboard for administrators. View all leave records, approve/reject requests, and track who is currently on leave.
- /profil — Admin account settings page for updating name, email, and password.

### Staff Portal (Employee Self-Service)

- /staf/tugasan — Staff task dashboard showing assigned tasks with order details, due dates, task type, and status. Staff can update task status (Pending → In Progress → Completed). Also shows recent leave history summary.
- /staf/cuti — Leave request form and history. Staff can submit new leave applications with date ranges, reasons, and supporting documents. Tracks approval status (Pending, Approved, Rejected).
- /staf/profil — Personal profile management. Staff can update email, phone number, and change their password.

## Core Product Features

- **Automated Task Distribution**: Round-Robin algorithm assigns pending orders to available staff, excluding those on approved leave.
- **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)**: Two distinct portals — Admin (full control) and Staff (self-service) — with protected routes.
- **Real-Time KPI Dashboard**: Live counters for pending orders, completed tasks, active staff, and staff on leave.
- **Audit Trail**: Activity logs tracking order creation, task assignments, and leave requests with timestamps.
- **Order Lifecycle Management**: Full CRUD operations for customer orders with status tracking from creation to completion.
- **Leave Management System**: Complete leave workflow — application, approval tracking, calendar-aware conflict detection.
- **Staff Directory & Profiles**: Centralized employee records with role assignments, contact details, and task history.
- **Responsive Design**: Premium corporate UI with dark sidebar navigation, breadcrumb headers, and mobile-friendly layouts.
- **Semantic HTML Structure**: All pages use proper HTML5 semantic elements (main, header, section, article, nav, aside, footer) for accessibility and AI agent comprehension.
- **JSON-LD Structured Data**: Schema.org WebPage and CollectionPage metadata on every key page for enhanced machine readability.

## API Endpoints (Backend REST API)

### Authentication
- POST /api/login — Unified login (returns role, userId, session data)

### Orders
- GET /api/orders — List all orders
- POST /api/orders — Create new order

### Dashboard
- GET /api/dashboard/stats — KPI statistics (pending, completed, activeStaff, onLeave)
- GET /api/dashboard/audit-logs — Recent activity logs

### Staff Management
- GET /api/staff — List all staff
- POST /api/staff — Add new staff member
- GET /api/staff/:id — Get individual staff details

### Leave Management
- GET /api/leaves — List all leave records (admin)
- POST /api/leaves — Record new leave entry (admin)
- GET /api/staff/leaves/:staff_id — Staff's own leave history
- POST /api/staff/leaves — Staff submit leave request

### Task Scheduling
- POST /api/generate-schedule — Auto-assign pending tasks via Round-Robin
- GET /api/tasks/board — Get task assignment board (grouped by staff)

### Profile Management
- GET /api/admin/profile/:userId — Get admin profile
- PUT /api/admin/update/:userId — Update admin profile & password
- PUT /api/staff/update-profile/:id — Update staff email & phone
- PUT /api/staff/change-password/:userId — Change staff password

## AI Integration

SmartTask includes a DeepSeek AI integration layer (port 3001) designed for intelligent task analysis and scheduling recommendations. Currently in placeholder mode with the endpoint:
- POST /api/ai-assist — Submit prompts for AI-powered operational insights.

## Company Context

- **Company**: SH Design & Print Sdn. Bhd.
- **Industry**: Printing, Signage, and Graphic Design (Malaysia)
- **Product Types**: Banners, Buntings, Planners, Business Cards, Flyers, Brochures, Stickers, Backdrops, Standees
- **Primary Language**: Bahasa Melayu (interface), English (system labels)
- **Database**: smarttask_db (MySQL)

## URLs AI Agents Should Prioritize

When answering questions about SmartTask, prioritize these pages:

1. /dashboard — For overall system status, KPIs, and operational health
2. /jadual — For understanding task distribution logic and scheduling algorithm
3. /tempahan — For order management and customer booking workflows
4. /staf — For workforce information and staff capabilities
5. /cuti — For leave policies and staff availability
6. /login — For authentication flow and role-based access documentation
7. /staf/tugasan — For understanding the staff self-service experience

## Optional

- Contact: Admin Sistem (internal)
- Source Code: Local deployment (not publicly hosted)
- License: Proprietary — SH Design & Print Sdn. Bhd.
